case_title: MCLAUGHLIN YEH LLP VS. SYNDIC GROUP ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN YEH LLP
